name: 67.75"x17" Modern Floor Lamp with Table Brass - Threshold™: ETL Listed, Polyester Shade, Metal Body
description:
Give your interior lighting a stylish, contemporary refresh with this Modern Floor Lamp with Table from Threshold™. Designed with a brass-finish metal base and stem and a white fabric shade, this floor lamp also features a brass-tone table at the center that you can use for resting books, candles or drinks. The lamp has a one-way light setting with an easy turn knob rotary switch, and the five-foot power cord allows for versatile placement in any room.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
